task: Find all duplicate files (same content) in /tmp/clive/files/ by comparing MD5 hashes. Write groups of duplicates to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: mkdir -p /tmp/clive/files && echo 'content A' > /tmp/clive/files/file1.txt && echo 'content A' > /tmp/clive/files/copy1.txt && echo 'content B' > /tmp/clive/files/file2.txt && echo 'content A' > /tmp/clive/files/copy2.txt && echo 'content C' > /tmp/clive/files/file3.txt

task: Batch rename all files in /tmp/clive/photos/: convert from 'IMG_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.jpg' format to 'YYYY-MM-DD_photo_NNN.jpg' format. Write the rename mapping to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Analyze disk usage of /tmp/clive/ recursively. Show: top 10 largest files, total size per subdirectory, and files over 1KB. Write the report to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: mkdir -p /tmp/clive/project/src /tmp/clive/project/data && dd if=/dev/zero of=/tmp/clive/project/data/big.dat bs=1024 count=5 2>/dev/null && echo 'small' > /tmp/clive/project/src/app.py

task: Write a script that archives files older than 30 days from /tmp/clive/logs/ into a dated tar.gz, then deletes the originals. Report archived file count and total size saved. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: mkdir -p /tmp/clive/logs && for i in 1 2 3; do touch -t 202602010000 /tmp/clive/logs/old_${i}.log; done && echo 'recent' > /tmp/clive/logs/new.log

task: Sync two directories: copy new/modified files from /tmp/clive/source/ to /tmp/clive/dest/, delete files in dest that don't exist in source (mirror mode). Write a sync report (added, updated, deleted counts) to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: mkdir -p /tmp/clive/source /tmp/clive/dest && echo 'new content' > /tmp/clive/source/file1.txt && echo 'same' > /tmp/clive/source/file2.txt && echo 'same' > /tmp/clive/dest/file2.txt && echo 'to delete' > /tmp/clive/dest/old_file.txt

task: Write a script that securely deletes sensitive files: overwrite with random data 3 times before deletion. Test with /tmp/clive/sensitive.txt. Write confirmation to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Convert the directory tree of /tmp/clive/project/ into a JSON representation showing the hierarchy, file sizes, and types. Write to /tmp/clive/result.json.

Write a script at /tmp/clive/watch_changes.sh that creates checksums of all files in a directory, then detects changes on next run by comparing with saved checksums. Test by modifying a file between runs. Write change report to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Split /tmp/clive/large.csv into smaller files of 5 lines each (including header in each). Write the count of output files to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo 'id,name,value' > /tmp/clive/large.csv && for i in $(seq 1 20); do echo "$i,item_$i,$((RANDOM%1000))"; done >> /tmp/clive/large.csv

task: Compress /tmp/clive/testdata/ with gzip, bzip2, and xz (where available). Compare compressed sizes and write a comparison table showing original size, compressed size, and ratio for each method to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: mkdir -p /tmp/clive/testdata && for i in $(seq 1 100); do echo "Line $i: $(cat /dev/urandom | LC_ALL=C tr -dc 'a-zA-Z0-9' | head -c 80)"; done > /tmp/clive/testdata/data.txt

task: Audit file permissions in /tmp/clive/: find world-writable files, SUID/SGID files, and files with no owner read permission. Write the security audit report to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: mkdir -p /tmp/clive/audit_test && echo 'normal' > /tmp/clive/audit_test/normal.txt && echo 'wide open' > /tmp/clive/audit_test/open.txt && chmod 777 /tmp/clive/audit_test/open.txt && echo 'restricted' > /tmp/clive/audit_test/restricted.txt && chmod 000 /tmp/clive/audit_test/restricted.txt 2>/dev/null

task: Find all symbolic links in /tmp/clive/ and check if they point to valid targets. Report broken symlinks. Write the report to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Generate a file age report for /tmp/clive/: group files by age bucket (today, this week, this month, older). Show count and total size per bucket. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
